title: AWT-armor wepen tools
description: This mod adds new types of armor, weapons, and tools.
body:
AWT— New Materials, New Power!

AWT expands Minecraft’s progression system by adding brand-new armor sets, weapons, and tools made from unique materials. More choices, more strategies, and more ways to build your playstyle!

🛡 New Armor Sets & Tools
🔹 Quartz Gear

Lightweight and efficient

Perfect for Nether exploration

🔹 Lapis Gear

Enhanced enchantment potential

Great synergy with enchanting tables

🔹 Emerald Gear

Durable and rare

Designed for mid-to-late game progression

🔹 Obsidian Gear

Extremely high durability

fire and lava resistance

Heavy but reliable

🔹 Amethyst Gear

Stylish purple aesthetic ✨

🔹 Coremetal Gear

A Netherite-tier alternative

Crafted from gold, iron, and copper

High durability and powerful stats

Advanced survival progression option

🔹 Enderit Gear

Rare material found in the End

Endgame-tier equipment

Increased resistance to damage 

Built for the toughest battles

🔹 Stone Armor

Early-game protection

Stronger than leather

A solid start for new worlds

🔹 nether star Gear

Endgame-tier equipment

High durability and powerful stats

fire and lava resistance

🔹 Glass tools

very high efficiency

low strength

🔹 Echo shard Gear
Durable and rare

Designed for mid-to-late game progression
